name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance Aurora, Colorado — US Cash Advance offers fast payday loans and cash advances up to $1,000 with same-day funding and no credit check req...
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical lending location in Detroit, Michigan at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd, serving customers who need emergency funds quickly. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed for individuals facing urgent financial needs and those with poor or no credit history. Their business model centers on rapid approval and funding cycles, positioning themselves as an accessible alternative for borrowers who cannot qualify through traditional banking channels.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans (up to $1,000), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), cash advances, same-day loans, and personal loans for bad credit. All products are unsecured and accept applicants regardless of credit type. Their stated benefits include fast access to cash, acceptance of bad credit applicants, no collateral requirements, minimal paperwork, and flexibility in loan use. The application process involves filling an online form, getting connected to a third-party lender, reviewing the offer, signing a contract, and receiving cash.

US Cash Advance emphasizes transparent service and customer experience, as evidenced by staff like Doris who reportedly explain terms clearly and avoid hidden fees. They maintain extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) and provide multiple contact methods. Customer reviews highlight fast approval times (under 45 minutes reported) and same-day funding within hours. The company operates with a headquarters address listed in Charlotte, NC and uses a compliance-focused email domain.

As an emergency cash lender, US Cash Advance serves a legitimate but high-cost market segment. Customers should be aware that while the company advertises transparent terms and no hidden fees, payday loans and cash advances are inherently expensive short-term debt products. The website mentions APR disclosures exist but cuts off before providing specific rates. Borrowers should carefully review all terms before committing and consider whether this is truly an emergency need versus a sign of larger cash flow problems.
address: 16909 E Quincy Ave a, Aurora, CO 80015

company_info.headquarters: 16909 E Quincy Ave a, Aurora, CO 80015

pros: Same-day or next-day funding reported by customers (cash within hours)
Fast in-person approval process documented at under 45 minutes
Staff transparency regarding fees and repayment terms emphasized in reviews
No collateral or credit check required for loans
Extended operating hours including weekends (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends)
Flexible loan amounts ($100-$50,000 depending on product type)
Multiple contact channels (phone, email, in-person location)
cons: No information provided about actual APR or interest rates on the website
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area with limited seating
No online pre-approval option despite customers requesting this feature
Loan products are unsecured short-term debt that can create debt cycles if misused
Uses third-party lenders rather than direct lending, adding complexity to terms
best_for: Workers needing emergency cash before next paycheck for urgent bills or medical expenses
Individuals with poor credit who cannot access traditional bank loans quickly
Borrowers in genuine short-term financial crises who can repay within weeks
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for working individuals with poor credit who face genuine emergencies and need cash within hours—not days. The primary caveat is that payday loans are expensive short-term debt, typically carrying APRs in the 400%+ range (not disclosed on this site), and should only be used when no alternatives exist, as they can trap borrowers in debt cycles if used repeatedly.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit location
